nl_query: List all students with WITHHELD eligibility for the Data Structures end-semester exam.
failed_sql: SELECT DISTINCT sc.student_id, sc.name, esm.eligibility_status FROM student_cache sc JOIN exam_student_mapping esm ON esm.student_id = sc.student_id JOIN academic_unit_closure c ON c.descendant_id = esm.course_id JOIN exam_schedule_cache esc ON esc.exam_id = esm.exam_id WHERE esm.eligibility_status = 'WITHHELD' AND esc.exam_type = 'END_SEM' AND c.ancestor_id = :department_id AND c.depth > 0 ORDER BY sc.name LIMIT 200;
